# APK asset audit — why the on-device agent went dead (2026-07-03, emulator-5584)

# The full-agent debug APK (built from the eliza checkout) carries the agent
# runtime under assets/agent/. A concurrent worktree's UI-only WebView-debug APK
# does NOT. Reinstalling the UI-only build over the full one bumped the APK mtime,
# triggered ElizaAgentService's "APK changed -> wipe extracted agent" path, then
# failed to re-extract because the new APK has no assets/agent/*.

## Full-agent APK (correct build for the local-agent lane)
$ ls -la .../app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
-rw-r--r-- 592578150 Jul 2 22:13 app-debug.apk
$ unzip -l app-debug.apk | grep -c 'assets/agent/'
19
$ unzip -l app-debug.apk | grep -E 'assets/agent/(agent-bundle|launch|arm64-v8a/bun)'
    2360  assets/agent/launch.sh
 72347313  assets/agent/agent-bundle.js
        …  assets/agent/arm64-v8a/bun
        …  assets/agent/arm64-v8a/ld-musl-aarch64.so.1
        …  assets/agent/arm64-v8a/libelizainference.so
        …  assets/agent/pglite.wasm / initdb.wasm / pglite.data
        …  assets/agent/vector.tar / fuzzystrmatch.tar (aapt2-stripped .gz)

## UI-only WebView-debug APK (what actually got installed, from a sibling worktree)
$ ls -la .claude/worktrees/agent-a3efa382230e7d9d5/.../app-debug.apk
-rw-r--r-- 89349340 Jul 3 20:34 app-debug.apk
$ unzip -l <installed base.apk pulled from device> | grep -c 'assets/agent/'
0

## On device after the swap
$ adb shell run-as ai.elizaos.app ls files/agent/agent-bundle.js files/agent/arm64-v8a/
ls: files/agent/agent-bundle.js: No such file or directory   # wiped, not re-extracted
files/agent/arm64-v8a/  -> empty
$ adb shell run-as ai.elizaos.app cat files/agent/.apk-stamp
1783123213825   # stale: still the mtime from the last SUCCESSFUL extraction
